title: Automated SEO Requirements v4
description: Generate a fashion editorial SEO keyword cluster, metadata set, and FAQ questions from an article topic

primary_keyword.description: One primary keyword phrase that best captures the core fashion search query

primary_related_keyword.description: One closely related keyword phrase with adjacent but distinct search value

secondary_keywords_explicit.description: Two secondary keywords that should appear verbatim in the article body

secondary_keywords_implicit.description: Six semantically related supporting phrases that do not need to appear verbatim

search_intents.description: Eight broader reader intents or semantic themes the article should satisfy

meta_title_options.description: Two editorial and SEO-aware meta title options

draft_meta_descriptions.description: Two polished meta description options written in editorial language

faq_questions.description: Five FAQ questions phrased as natural search queries a reader would type into Google. Questions 1-2 map closely to the primary and primary related keywords. Questions 3-5 are creative, exploratory, and cover adjacent reader needs relevant to the topic. All five must be distinct and suitable for Google FAQ rich results schema.
